user.title: Connect Nespresso
user.description:
**How to get the tokens:**

1. Open Chrome and go to [nespresso.com/it/it/login](https://www.nespresso.com/it/it/login)
2. Open DevTools with **F12** → go to the **Network** tab
3. Log in with your Nespresso account
4. In the Network list, click on the **login** request (POST)
5. Open the **Headers** tab
6. Scroll down to **Response Headers** → find the **Set-Cookie** entries
7. Copy the value of **access-token=...** (long JWT string)
8. Copy the value of **refresh-token=...** (short UUID like `xxxxxxxx-xxxx-xxxx-xxxx-xxxxxxxxxxxx`)
9. Paste both below

error.invalid_token: Invalid or expired token. Re-copy the cookies from the login request.
error.no_machines: No smart machines found on this account.
